summary: Vinyl Variant Pages feature fully tested and working. All backend API endpoints and frontend UI components verified. SSR for social bots working correctly with proper meta tags and JSON-LD schema.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} returns JSON with variant_overview, marketplace, value, demand, activity, seo fields
VERIFIED: GET /api/vinyl/ssr/{artist}/{album}/{variant} returns SSR HTML with OG tags, Twitter cards, vinyl meta tags, canonical URL, JSON-LD Product schema
VERIFIED: Frontend /vinyl/taylor-swift/fearless/sunshine-yellow renders with all required sections and data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: Empty state messages displayed correctly when no data (DB is empty per agent context)
VERIFIED: Bot middleware in craco.config.js routes /vinyl/* paths to SSR endpoint for social bots
VERIFIED: Normal user requests receive React SPA, bot requests receive SSR HTML
VERIFIED: SEOHead component properly injects vinyl metadata, OG tags, Twitter cards, and JSON-LD Product schema

VERIFIED: All data-testid attributes present: vinyl-variant-page, variant-overview, variant-title, variant-artist, variant-pill, value-section, marketplace-section, collectors-section, activity-section
test_credentials: No auth needed - vinyl variant pages are public
seed_data_creation: None - tested with empty DB per agent context, all empty state handling verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vinyl variant pages feature complete. Test URL: /vinyl/taylor-swift/fearless/sunshine-yellow. API returns fallback values from URL slugs when no DB records exist. SSR endpoint properly serves HTML with full SEO metadata to social bots. Frontend React SPA serves to regular users.

api_vinyl_variant_json.details: GET /api/vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} returns correct JSON structure with variant_overview, marketplace, value, demand, activity, seo sections

api_vinyl_ssr_html.details: GET /api/vinyl/ssr/{artist}/{album}/{variant} returns SSR HTML with all required meta tags

ssr_og_tags.details: SSR includes og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type=product, og:site_name

ssr_twitter_cards.details: SSR includes twitter:card=summary_large_image, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image

ssr_vinyl_meta.details: SSR includes vinyl:artist, vinyl:album, vinyl:variant, vinyl:format meta tags

ssr_json_ld_schema.details: JSON-LD Product schema with MusicGroup brand, category=Vinyl Record, additionalProperty for variant

bot_middleware_normal_user.details: Normal browser user-agent receives React SPA

frontend_variant_overview.details: Hero section with album art, variant pill, title, artist, and stats cards

frontend_value_section.details: Market Value section with empty state message

frontend_marketplace_section.details: Marketplace section with empty state message

frontend_collectors_section.details: Collectors section with empty state message

frontend_activity_section.details: Hive Activity section with empty state message

frontend_seo_head.details: SEOHead component injects document title, canonical URL, OG tags, Twitter cards, vinyl meta tags, JSON-LD Product schema
